Locked balances are transferred to the new claim — no double-counting occurs. Returns both the cancelled original and the new replacement.

400.description: Original claim is not in a cancellable status.

info.title: ChainForge API
info.description:
API documentation for ChainForge platform - Humanitarian aid and verification system

## API Versioning

This API uses URI-based versioning. The current version is **v1**.

### Version Format
All endpoints are prefixed with the version number: `/api/v1/...`

### Supported Versions
| Version | Status | Description |
|---------|--------|-------------|
| v1 | Current | Active version with full support |

### Deprecation Policy
- Deprecated endpoints will be marked with `@Deprecated` in the documentation
- Deprecated versions will be supported for at least 6 months after deprecation notice
- Clients will receive deprecation warnings via the `Sunset` HTTP header
- Migration guides will be provided for major version changes

### Future Versions
When new versions are released:
- New endpoints will be available at `/api/v2/...`, etc.
- Previous versions remain accessible during the deprecation period
- Clients should monitor the API documentation for version updates

deliveryId.description: Unique delivery ID to prevent duplicate processing

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the event generation for state ordering

email.description: Email address (required when channel is email)

phone.description: Phone number (required when channel is phone)

sessionId.description: Verification session ID returned from start
Unique identifier for the current verification session.

code.description: OTP code received via email or phone

submittedAt.description: Timestamp when the verification request was submitted.

content.description: The content of the internal note.
content.example: Investigation shows that the recipient has provided valid evidence.

budget.description: Total budget allocated to the campaign.

metadata.description: Arbitrary campaign metadata (e.g., region, location, target audience).

campaignId.description: ID of the campaign this claim belongs to

tokenAddress.description: Stellar token address (asset issuer or contract ID) for the distribution

evidenceRef.description: Reference or link to evidence supporting the claim (e.g., photo, document hash).

expiresAt.description: When the claim should automatically expire if it remains unprocessed.

emailAddresses.description: Email address(es) to send receipt to

phoneNumbers.description: Phone number(s) to send receipt to (SMS)

message.description: Custom message to include with receipt (optional)

mimeType.description: MIME type of the receipt data

text.description: Text representation of receipt for sharing

operatorId.description: ID of the operator performing the cancellation.

reason.example: Recipient relocated; package no longer applicable.

operatorId.description: ID of the operator performing the reissue.

amount.description: Override amount for the replacement package. Defaults to the original amount when omitted.

recipientRef.description: Override recipient reference for the replacement package.

recipientAddress.description: Stellar address of the aid recipient

amount.description: Amount in stroops (i128 as string to preserve precision)

expiresAt.description: Unix timestamp when the package expires

amounts.description: Array of amounts (in stroops, as strings)

expiresIn.description: Duration in seconds from now until expiration

role.description: Role associated with this API key.

ngoId.description: Optional NGO scope for this key (required for NGO role).

description.description: Human-friendly description of the key purpose.

stepOrder.description: Order of the step in the flow

maxAttempts.description: Maximum attempts allowed for this step

input.description: Initial input data for the step

contextId.description: Context identifier (e.g., claim ID, user ID)

steps.description: Steps to create for multi-step sessions

stepName.description: Optional step name to target specific step

entity.description: Entity type this policy applies to (e.g. AuditLog, VerificationSession, Session, Claim)

retentionDays.description: Number of days to retain records before purging

strategy.description: Purge strategy: soft_delete, hard_delete, or anonymize

entity.description: Entity type this policy applies to (e.g. AuditLog, VerificationSession, Session, Claim)

retentionDays.description: Number of days to retain records before purging

strategy.description: Purge strategy: soft_delete, hard_delete, or anonymize
